postReview.title: Vanney urges LA Galaxy to find solutions as winless MLS run continues
postReview.description: LA Galaxy are still awaiting their first victory of the 2025 MLS season after they were beaten by Sporting Kansas City on Sunday.

QAData.question: Who won between Sporting Kansas City and LA Galaxy on Sun, 04 May 2025 23:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Sporting Kansas City won 1–0 over LA Galaxy on Sun, 04 May 2025 23:00:00 GMT.
